title: Various medications
description: А mod that adds various medications and emotions
body:
**Various medications**
- After installing this mod, various medicines will appear in the game, starting with medicinal herbs and ending with a first aid kit. Emotions will also be added to the game, such as fear, relaxation, happiness and anxiety, which will appear in certain situations.
  
![all plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0bd3d2e08afe80330ebdb01936cf8d6a106c4bf.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
- While exploring the plains you can find various plants; by collecting them you can turn them into an ointment that gives different effects. and if you are hit by hostile mobs, you can get an unpleasant bleeding effect that will gradually kill you, but you can bandage the bleeding with a bandage.
  
![All ointments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/657a32cdbf3868a8f40d54842e1f3333f873a8be.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- After wandering around the nether, you can get a cooking stand in which you can prepare extracts from plants found earlier, and then you can inject them with a syringe and get the effects of ointments, but for a longer time. If you collect all the extracts and a couple of bandages, you can collect a first aid kit that can treat bleeding and gives pleasant effects.

![All suringes and first aid kit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c938d5cc34ec34d663c00d77af8ff64abe45349.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Disclaimer: Not Real Medical Content**
- This mod is created solely for entertainment purposes and is not intended for use in real medical situations. All elements related to medications, medical procedures, and herbs in this mod are fictional and have no real medical application. The author takes no responsibility for the use of this mod outside the context of the game.
